description_long: This object is a large, organized collection of hangers arranged in a grid pattern. The hangers vary in shape and size, with some featuring traditional triangular forms and others having more specialized hooks or clips. The majority appear to be made of metal, with a few possibly featuring plastic or coated finishes. The hangers are predominantly black, with a few white and metallic silver ones interspersed, and at least one with a copper or bronze hue. The arrangement suggests a display or storage setup, possibly for retail or organizational use. The hangers are lightweight, thin, and designed to hold clothing or similar items.
description: A grid of assorted metal and plastic hangers in various shapes and colors, primarily black, white, and metallic. The hangers are neatly arranged and vary in design, with some featuring clips or special hooks.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the full grid of hangers, highlighting their arrangement and the diversity in shapes and colors.
description_view_1: A side view emphasizing the thin profiles and hook shapes of the hangers, with the grid pattern clearly visible.
description_view_2: A reverse top-down view, similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, showing the backs of the hangers and their arrangement.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction of view 1, focusing on the profiles and the density of the hangers in the grid.
